functional_audit.check: ProgressBar exports from design-system barrel and clamps value prop 0–100

ui_evidence.notes: Root wrapper; Bubble root also carries muted bgcolor and 8px height — delegated to bTIua child in React
Fill: var(--color_primary_default), width scales via inline style percentage

critiques.finding: Bubble IR places bTIuZ (HTML) and bTIua (Group) as sibling children of bTIuS; the React component nests bTIuZ inside bTIua. Visual outcome is equivalent but parent_element_id hierarchy differs from drsam-99657.bubble element_definitions/bTIuT.
critiques.alternative: Render bTIuZ and bTIua as siblings under bTIuS with absolute/overlay positioning to mirror Bubble order, or document the intentional flattening in layout_notes.

critiques.finding: Bubble root (bTIuS/bTIuT) applies muted track bgcolor and 8px max-height on the element definition itself; React root is a transparent w-full wrapper and track styling lives only on bTIua.
critiques.alternative: Apply track background and height constraints on the bTIuS root div to closer match IR presentation on the reusable definition.

critiques.finding: Raw Bubble presentation uses border_roundness 9999 (pill) on bTIuT and bTIua; implementation uses 4px radius per decompose AC-2. AC-compliant but not pixel-identical to source IR.
critiques.alternative: No change needed while AC-2 binds 4px; revisit if downstream screens expect pill-shaped bars from live Bubble.
